Appearance
From Wiktionary, the free dictionary
< Wiktionary:Frequency lists

For a description of this list, refer to the list of the top 10,000 most frequent words.

The words on this list make up about 4% of Japanese Wikipedia. Terms less frequent than the 20,000th most frequent term make up 3.5% of the encyclopedia.
